title: Publisher Confirms, Windows, and Ambiguity · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new a bounded Go confirm-window ledger. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a bounded Go confirm-window ledger with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state.
Bound unconfirmed count, bytes, and age while preserving throughput, memory, fairness, and per-message outcome evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Explain when confirms occur for unroutable messages, persistent classic queues, quorum queues, and multiple routed queues; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Confirm Channel Contract
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 4506 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; name the owner and stop path for every goroutine and notification channel; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Confirm Channel Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Confirm Channel Contract, keep Confirm Channel Contract connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
